commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d32a47a5c1e2fc74df060e79691e741c95702096)
commands.review_summary:
The PR renames managed QMD memory/custom/session collections from agent-scoped names to bare collection names and updates related unit-test expectations.

PR surface: Source -77, Tests 0. Total -77 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR findings: source inspection of the PR commit shows `pickSessionCollectionName()` now returns `sessions` while tests still expect `sessions-main`, and one changed test asserts the same collection keys both present and absent. I did not run tests because this review was constrained to read-only inspection.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the PR changes a shipped persisted naming contract, has concrete upgrade/session-state blockers, and still needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof.

target.title: fix(memory): drop redundant agent-id scoping from QMD collection names
target.body:
## Summary

Remove the redundant `-<agentId>` suffix from QMD managed collection names. Each agent already has an isolated QMD index at `agents/<agentId>/qmd/`, so collection names cannot collide across agents — the agent-id suffix was unnecessary.

## Changes

- **`packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/backend-config.ts`**: Removed `scopeCollectionBase()` and the `agentId` parameter from `resolveDefaultCollections()` and `resolveCustomPaths()`. Collections now use their bare base names (`memory-root`, `memory-dir`, `sessions`, explicit names).

- **`extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.ts`**: Removed `migrateLegacyUnscopedCollections()`, `deriveLegacyCollectionName()`, `canMigrateLegacyCollection()`, and `sanitizeCollectionNameSegment()`. Updated `pickSessionCollectionName()` to use `sessions` instead of `sessions-<agentId>`.

- **Test files**: Updated all expectations to match the new base collection names.

## Testing

The existing test suites cover this change — all collection name expectations have been updated to reflect the simplified naming.

Fixes #91259

---

Hi @vignesh07 @steipete, could you please review this PR when you have time? I'd appreciate your feedback on the approach. Thank you!
